topic: A restaurant owner called me on a Friday afternoon. His receptionist had just quit.

slides.title: No notice. No replacement.
slides.body: A restaurant owner called me on a Friday afternoon. Weekend bookings coming in and nobody to answer the phone.

slides.title: By Monday morning his restaurant had an AI receptionist.
slides.body: Answering every call. Knew the menu. Knew the hours. Knew the booking rules. Sent WhatsApp confirmations to every guest automatically.

slides.title: Over 200 calls handled. Zero missed bookings.
slides.body: That was three weeks ago. Not a single booking lost since.

slides.title: The interesting part:
slides.body: He originally called me about social media. The phone problem came up in conversation. It took 72 hours to solve a problem he had been living with for years.

slides.title: Most small businesses do not need a 6-month transformation.
slides.body: They need someone who listens to the actual problem and builds the fix in days.

slides.title: If your business runs on calls and bookings, send me a message.
slides.body: I will show you what we would build for yours.
